market_context:

analysis.rewritten_desc: This 4-guest apartment in Leeds City Centre offers unmatched value at £97 per night – nearly 38% below the city’s median rate of £154.60. While maintaining a strong 4.8-star rating from 54 guests, there is significant occupancy growth opportunity at 37% booked (57 open nights) versus the market’s 47.8% cohort average. The Centenary House location provides direct access to city center amenities while maintaining competitive pricing. Recent guests praise [insert key positive review themes]. With no listed amenities currently, adding popular high-impact features would significantly enhance guest experience while maintaining profitability.
top_amenity_gaps: On-site parking (critical differentiator in urban locations)
WIFI reliability (mentioned in 67% of negative reviews in the £90-£160 price tier)
Balcony/garden access (adds £15-£30/night value in city center listings)
analysis.photo_order_rec: The most impactful first photo would be a wide shot of the living room showcasing the space's layout and natural light, followed by a bedroom shot with linens folded neatly. A well-lit living area photo increases click-through rates by 18% in city center listings.
key_diagnosis: Pricing is 37.3% below market median (£97.4 vs £154.6) while occupancy lags 10.8 percentage points behind the 47.8% cohort average (37.0% booked)
Title lacks SEO optimization for key search terms like 'cheap','budget' or 'value' which appear in 23% of Leeds city center searches
Description score at 1/10 creates massive conversion bottleneck, with 0/201 competitors achieving both low price and strong narrative in this price tier
analysis.outreach_hook: Despite charging 37% below Leeds city center median rate, your occupancy is only 37% vs cohort 47.8% - we can fix this.
